target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade extensively missing; roof collapsed; debris pile covering ground level; structural framing largely intact but non-load-bearing elements completely destroyed; damage exceeds 75% of visible target element area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: The target building shows complete collapse of its upper structure; debris piles at ground level; structural framing is missing; visible absence of roof and upper walls; consistent with 75-100% damage per doctrinal definition for framed buildings.

summary: Two buildings assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, both showing complete structural collapse and debris piles. The overall scene depicts a street flanked by heavily damaged, multi-story buildings with missing facades, collapsed roofs, and extensive rubble, indicating severe destruction. The functional impact is likely total loss of building integrity and usability, consistent with the prior assessments.
